name: Reddit Ads MCP Server (BigVik193)
what_it_does: MCP server for Reddit Advertising API enabling AI agents to manage Reddit ad campaigns end-to-end — across accounts, funding methods, campaigns, ad groups, and creatives. Enables programmatic Reddit advertising management from AI agents.
use_cases: Managing Reddit ad campaigns from advertising automation agents
Creating and optimizing Reddit ad groups and creatives from marketing agents
Monitoring Reddit advertising performance and spend from analytics agents
Automating Reddit advertising workflows from media buying agents
not_for: Organic Reddit content or community management (advertising API focus)
Consumer-targeted spam (must comply with Reddit Ads policies)
best_when: A digital marketer or agency running Reddit advertising campaigns wants AI agents to automate campaign management — reducing manual work in Reddit Ads Manager.
avoid_when: You don't advertise on Reddit. Reddit Ads API requires advertiser account with billing. Also: autonomous ad creation must comply with Reddit's advertising policies.

auth.notes: Reddit Ads API uses OAuth 2.0. Requires Reddit Ads API access (apply at ads.reddit.com). Scopes for campaign management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Reddit Ads API is free for advertisers; ad spend costs apply
pricing.paid_tiers: None for API; Reddit advertising budget is the cost
pricing.notes: Reddit Ads API free for advertisers. Real ad spend is the cost. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Reddit Ads API rate limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Agents can create campaigns spending real advertising budget
Reddit Ads API requires advertiser account approval — not instant access
OAuth token management required for long-running advertising agents
Reddit advertising policies must be followed — non-compliant ads will be rejected
Community implementation — validate against current Reddit Ads API version
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Advertising spend controls. OAuth via Reddit. Implement budget caps. Reddit Ads policies compliance required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Ad spend financial risk. OAuth security. Reddit policies compliance. Budget limits essential.
